2388670.name: Speedy Guys
2388670.description:
Save the Pub!!


Oh no! Guy has just learned his local pub is closing down! Devastated by the news he goes out to try and save it.

In this infinite runner you will collect coins, whilst trying to avoid obstacles as you get progressively faster and faster. Hop into a special plane named "The Rob-Mobile" and take to the skies, where new obstacles await!

Features:


  • Avoid hazards along the ground while collecting coins
  • Take to the skies where new dangers await
  • Play as Guy, or one his 8 other friends, each with unique abilities to master
  • Use powerful special abilities to escape from tricky spots
  • Explore 3 unique locations with their own challenges to overcome
  • Learn more about the characters in special side stories
  • Aim for a high score!
